title: Twenty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta on April 7
summary: On April 7, YKHC reports twenty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Tuberculosis in the YK Delta
summary: YKHC is aware of outbreaks of tuberculosis (TB) in the YK Delta. The current case counts are increased from prior years and can lead to strain on the health care system. To protect the privacy of our patients and the communities we serve, YKHC will not comment on specific villages. However, we want...

title: GVEA Board Keeps Utility & Demand Charges Flat
summary: These Charges have remained unchanged since January 2020.

title: Sockeye Dinners at Any Age
summary: Bambino's Baby Food is an Alaskan-owned business that manufactures baby food using local ingredients, including sockeye salmon. The post Sockeye Dinners at Any Age appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
